name: Pinnacle

sections.intro:
Pinnacle Roboticsis the thirdislandin the gameInto the Breach. Led by their CEOZenith, Pinnacle's community of humans and robots co-exist together to stop both the Vek and their hijacked machines.
Upon creation of a new save file Pinnacle Robotics is locked until two islands (BothArchive IncandR.S.T. Corporation) are complete. Afterwards, it can be done in any order in all future timelines.
sections.Island-Specific Missions: Advanced Edition missions are only encounterable if "Advanced Missions" are active for a timeline.
sections.Reputation Objectives:
- Break at least 5 buildings out of the ice: 1 ReputationAll buildings are encased in ice at the beginning of the mission.
  - Freeze and defend both robots: 2 Reputation, 1 for each frozen robotTwo hostileSentient Weaponsare present at the start of the mission, along with an ice tank.Reputation is only awarded for frozen robots.
  - Defend both robots: 2 Reputation, 1 for each surviving robotTwo allyMine-Botsstart near the enemy spawns at the start of the battle, and lay Cryo-Mines before moving.
  - Defend both robot factories: 2 Reputation, 1 for each factoryTwo Robot Factories take the place of grid buildings in this mission. Each turn, one of them spits out a random inactive sentient weapon that activates on the next turn.Robot Factories are considered grid buildings instead of units.
  - Destroy the Bot Leader: 1 ReputationAlways takes place along withProtect the Corporate Tower.Alternative to the Hive Leader fight.Pinnacle Island is the only island where theBot Leadercan be fought.
  - Kill all enemies before they retreat: 1 ReputationEnemies will start frozen and slowly thaw out turn by turn.
  - Destroy all Boom Bots (Advanced Edition): 2 Reputation4Boom Bots, 2 of which are frozen, are present at the start of the mission. They have Explosive Decay, much like a Vek under the effects of theBlast Psion.Partial completion of destroying at least 2 bots rewards 1 reputation.
  - Destroy the Hacking Facility + Protect the Cannon Bot (Advanced Edition): 1 Reputation each, 2 totalA shieldedCannon-Botand Hacking Facility spawn at the beginning of the game.When the hacking facility is destroyed, the Cannon-Bot becomes friendly.
  - Destroy the Shield Generator(Advanced Edition): 1 ReputationA Shield Generator makes all starting and newly-spawned units begin with a shield, including buildings.Destroying the generator removes all active shields, including those granted by the pilotsBethany Jones,Adamor shielding weapons. The pilotMafanis unaffected.
sections.Environmental Conditions:
- Ice StormCryo-nanites freeze 3x3 patches of tiles at the environment step of the enemy turn.
  - Cryo-MinesCryo-mines are spread across the map, freezing anything that comes in contact.
  - Thawing enemiesInstead of Vek spawn points, all hostiles start frozen and a select few are thawed out at the start of each turn. Can haveKill all enemies before they retreator another objective.

full_text:
Pinnacle Robotics
Details
CEO
Zenith
Environment
Frozen
“
Pinnacle Robotics fights a war on two fronts, one against the Vek, and the other against its own Sentient Weapons.
„
Pinnacle Robotics
is the third
island
in the game
Into the Breach
. Led by their CEO
Zenith
, Pinnacle's community of humans and robots co-exist together to stop both the Vek and their hijacked machines.
Upon creation of a new save file Pinnacle Robotics is locked until two islands (Both
Archive Inc
and
R.S.T. Corporation
) are complete. Afterwards, it can be done in any order in all future timelines.
Contents

Map
[
]
Island-Specific Missions
[
]
Advanced Edition missions are only encounterable if "Advanced Missions" are active for a timeline.
Reputation Objectives
[
]
Break at least 5 buildings out of the ice: 1 Reputation
All buildings are encased in ice at the beginning of the mission.
Freeze and defend both robots: 2 Reputation, 1 for each frozen robot
Two hostile
Sentient Weapons
are present at the start of the mission, along with an ice tank.
Reputation is only awarded for frozen robots.
Defend both robots: 2 Reputation, 1 for each surviving robot
Two ally
Mine-Bots
start near the enemy spawns at the start of the battle, and lay Cryo-Mines before moving.
Defend both robot factories: 2 Reputation, 1 for each factory
Two Robot Factories take the place of grid buildings in this mission. Each turn, one of them spits out a random inactive sentient weapon that activates on the next turn.
Robot Factories are considered grid buildings instead of units.
Destroy the Bot Leader: 1 Reputation
Always takes place along with
Protect the Corporate Tower.
Alternative to the Hive Leader fight.
Pinnacle Island is the only island where the
Bot Leader
can be fought.
Kill all enemies before they retreat: 1 Reputation
Enemies will start frozen and slowly thaw out turn by turn.
Destroy all Boom Bots (
Advanced Edition)
: 2 Reputation
4
Boom Bots
, 2 of which are frozen, are present at the start of the mission. They have Explosive Decay, much like a Vek under the effects of the
Blast Psion
.
Partial completion of destroying at least 2 bots rewards 1 reputation.
Destroy the Hacking Facility + Protect the Cannon Bot (
Advanced Edition)
: 1 Reputation each, 2 total
A shielded
Cannon-Bot
and Hacking Facility spawn at the beginning of the game.
When the hacking facility is destroyed, the Cannon-Bot becomes friendly.
Destroy the Shield Generator
(Advanced Edition)
: 1 Reputation
A Shield Generator makes all starting and newly-spawned units begin with a shield, including buildings.
Destroying the generator removes all active shields, including those granted by the pilots
Bethany Jones
,
Adam
or shielding weapons. The pilot
Mafan
is unaffected.
Environmental Conditions
[
]
Ice Storm
Cryo-nanites freeze 3x3 patches of tiles at the environment step of the enemy turn.
Cryo-Mines
Cryo-mines are spread across the map, freezing anything that comes in contact.
Thawing enemies
Instead of Vek spawn points, all hostiles start frozen and a select few are thawed out at the start of each turn. Can have
Kill all enemies before they retreat
or another objective.

]
